nasb.text: There were seven steps going up to it, and its porches were in front of them; and it had palm tree ornaments on its side pillars, one on each side.

esv.text: And there were seven steps leading up to it, and its vestibule was before them, and it had palm trees on its jambs, one on either side.

cnv.text: 人要登七級臺階才到這門，前面盡頭是門廊，牆柱上兩邊都刻有棕樹。

ccb.text: 登上七级石阶便到门廊，两边的墙柱也同样刻着棕树。
